svg.text: B's navigation and flat setpoint list; A's room cards live behind “Rooms”. “Now” shows the error signal — people, key signals, and what deviates from equilibrium. English-first labels from [naming].en.
self-hosted tiles (PMTiles) — served by the unit
empty when the house is in equilibrium — a calm page
“Now” = the error signal: deviations from equilibrium, not an inventory
map: a view over every entity with a
location aspect — not a per-entity widget;
tiles self-hosted, positions never leave the LAN
four sources, one feed: supervision, arbiter
preemptions, notable state, setpoints off default
people via an OwnTracks adapter → person
entities; where movers live in the room-keyed
key space is a design-doc decision to settle
map below; rooms and setpoints one tab away
Wireframe — grayscale is deliberate; visual design is a later pass. Labels from [naming].en; locale is a per-browser choice.
